basic_info.name: عصير العسل الطبيعي
basic_info.short_description: المشروع عباره عن عصير مكون من عسل النحل الطبيعي المستخرج من الشهد بواسطة النحل ومن ثم تحويله إلى عصير طبيعي خالي من المواد الكيميائية الضارة المسببة للسرطانات وتحويل هذا المنتج  إلى عصير مغدي للجسم يمده بالطاقة ويقدم لجميع الفيئات العمرية
basic_info.target_customers: العملاء المستهدفون هم جميع شرائح المجتمع وكذلك عيادات الطب البديل
basic_info.why_apply: اتقدم اليكم لأجل تنمية الفكرة واخراجها بمخرجات تتوافق مع السوق  لكي تلقى قبول لذى المستثمر اولاً ثم المستهلك ثانيا، كل ذلك من خلال عملية الاحتضان التي تهدف الى الرقي برواد الاعمال والانتقال ب
basic_info.project_story: (يَخْرُجُ مِنْ بُطُونِها شَرابٌ مُخْتَلِفٌ أَلْوانُهُ فِيهِ شِفاءٌ لِلنَّاسِ) من هذا المنطلق العقائدي، والخبرة التراكمية في تربية النحل استوحيت فكرة عصير العسل الطبيعي الخالي من جميع المواد الكيميائية ليكون هذا المنتج طبيعياً شعاره "الصحة للجميع"
basic_info.business_summary:
عصير العسل يستخرج من عسل النحل الطبيعي ومن خلال "القيمة المقترحة" الغدائية والصحية والعلاجية لهذا المنتج يكون التواصل مع "شرائح العملاء"  المستهدفين الجنسين الكبار والصغار والمرضي فمن خلال  "الانشطة الرئيسية" لهذا المنتج  يكون البيع لهذه الفيئات من ناحية والتدريب من ناحية اخري ليكون التصدير لهذا المنتج خطوة لاحقة لهذه المراحل عن طريق "شراكات رئيسية" مع مستثمرين ومربين وبلديات ومراكز رقابة على الاغدية ومعامل كيميائية لتكون وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي هي " القنوات " الفعالة لهذا المنتج  ومن خلال " الموارد الرئيسية " المتمثلة في الموارد البشرية والمالية والمواد التشغيلية وتكاليف التشغيل والمواد الخام نصل بها في  الختام إلى  "مصادر الايرادات " لهذا المنتج هو بيع عصير العسل والتدريب عليه في مرحلة لاحقه.
                  واخيرا نقول أن كان ما ذكرناه صواب فهو توفيقاً من الله وان جانبه الصواب فتسريحاً من معاليكم بإحسان .

يتم إنتاج أطباق الكرتون على عدة مراحل مختلفة تمر عليها، ومن أهم تلك المراحل هي:
المرحلة الأولى
تلك هي المرحلة الأساسية قد تم تسميتها بمرحلة تجهيز اللب، عليك أن تقوم بجمع الأوراق من الشوارع أو من المصانع الأخرى
المرحلة الثانية
يطلق على هذه المرحلة مرحلة الصب والتشكيل في نفس الوقت،  ففي تلك المرحلة عليك استخدام العديد من الأدوات اللازمة للتصنيع وهي:
شراء آلة تشكيل.
شراء طلمبة خاصة لسحب المياه.
أيضاً شراء طلمبة خاصة لتفريغ فاكيوم.
أخيراً شراء قوالب للتشكيل
المرحلة الثالثة
يتم في هذه المرحلة الانتهاء التام من تشكيل أطباق الكرتون، حيث يتم في هذه المرحلة تجفيف الأطباق حتى نستطيع حملها وتعبئتها.
المرحلة الرابعة
في تلك المرحلة يتم تجميع الأطباق فوق بعضها البعض، فهي الآن جاهزة من أجل التعبئة.

تسويق أطباق كرتون البيض
يوجد العديد من طرق التسويق التي يمكن من خلالها أن نسوق لهذا المشروع، فمن أهم تلك الطرق هي:
من الممكن أن يتم التسويق عن طريق الإنترنت في مواقع التواصل الاجتماعي المختلفة مثل الفيسبوك والتويتر.
كما من الممكن أن يتم التواصل مع محلات بيع البيض هذا لتسويق أطباق البيض.
كما يمكنك أن نقوم بعمل بعض الدعاية الإعلانية المختلفة، مثل توزيع بعض المطبوعات على مختلف الأماكن المحيطة بك

سوف يتم جني المال من المشروع عن طريق : 
1. تحديد أسعار تنافسية للمنتجات الخاصة بيا مع الأخذ في الاعتبار تكاليف المواد والعمل.
2. توفير تصاميم فريدة وجذابة تثير فضول المستهلكين .
3. طرق الدفع المتنوعة والسهلة .
4. المشاركة في المعارض الثقافية  لزيادة الوعي والاهتمام باللغة والثقافة الامازيغية وانتشار المشروع .

basic_info.name: سوبر ماركت إلكتروني
basic_info.short_description:
تصميم موقع الكتروني يعمل كمتجر 
 لتوفير الاحتياجات اليومية من المنتجات الغذائية وبيع السلع الاكتر استهلاكا وتوصيلها إلى المشترين في منازلهم .. مما يتيح لهم الراحة التامة وتوفير الجهد والوقت .. يعد مشروع مبتكر لم يكن موجدا في مدينتي ..
basic_info.why_apply: للمساعدة في تنفيذ فكرة المشروع وصولا به لحيز الوجود  ..
basic_info.project_story: لحاجة الافراد اليه وعدم وجود الوقت الكافي  للخروج من المنزل او مكان العمل لغرض التسوق وذلك لانشغالهم باعمالهم والتزاماتهم ..
basic_info.business_summary:
تصميم موقع الكتروني يعمل كمتجر 
 لتوفير الاحتياجات اليومية من المنتجات الغذائية وبيع السلع الاكتر استهلاكا وتوصيلها إلى المشترين في منازلهم .. مما يتيح لهم الراحة التامة وتوفير الجهد والوقت .. حيث يعد مشروع مبتكر لم يكن موجدا في مدينتي .. وتجنى المال بعدة طرق لانتشار خدمات الانترنت ووجود اكثر من طريقة دفع سهلة يمكن للعميل التعامل بها من غير معوقات .. كالبطاقات الالكترونية وغيرها .. وكذلك التخفيض في ثمن السلعة وزيادة ثمن الشحن .. واقامة الاعلانات بالتعامل مع الشركات المتخصصة ..

basic_info.name: متجر ملابس وأحدية رياضية
basic_info.short_description:
مشروعي هو عبارة عن إستيراد وبيع منتجات من ملابس وأحدية أصلية والغرض من مشروعي سأقدم منتج ذات جودة عالية 
والميزة أنه سيخدم جميع الفئات العمرية رجال ونساء وأطفال
وأنه لايوجد من يقدم نفس المنتج في نفس المنطقة الجغرافية
basic_info.target_customers: يستهدف مشروعي جميع الفئات العمرية. الرجال والنساء والاطفال
basic_info.why_apply: أتقدم لغرض الانتقال لمرحلة الاحتضان في مسابقة غريان لرواد الاعمال
basic_info.project_story: بحكم أني أشتغل في بيع الملابس لمدة خمس سنوات تقريبآ وجدت أنه لايوجد من يبيع منتجات أصلية في السوق وعندما يحتاجها العميل يلجأ للمدن الاخرى. ففكرت أني نأتي بعينة للتجربة فكان عليها إقبال غير عادي من العملاء  وذالك عن تجربتي الشخصية.
basic_info.business_summary: أولآ سيتم إستيراد المنتج من الخارج ومِن ثُم سيتم عرضه في المتجر الخاص بي وسيتم حساب تكلفة الشراءوتحديد سعر البيع مع مراعاة تكاليف التوريد. وعن طريق الدعاية والترويج سيتم جلب العملاء لإقناعهم بالمنتج وبيعه لهم

basic_info.short_description: صناعة شموع الديكور، مع استعمال الالوان والعطور، واستخدام القوالب والأشكال الجديده، مع ضمان استعمال شموع صديقة للبيئة مثل شمع الصويا وشمع النحل اي إضافة منتج جديد للسوق
basic_info.target_customers: جميع الفئات، وعلى وجه الخصوص فئة الاناث
basic_info.why_apply: لضمان تعلم معلومات جديده، وإضافة خبرات في هذا المجال، وكسب المال وملأ وقت الفراغ وصناعة الأشياء التي أحب صناعتها
basic_info.project_story: اساس الفكرة منذ الصغر كنت محبة للشموع وحاولت صناعتها اكتر من مره بواسطة الاواني المنزليه وتشحيلها داخل اكواب بدون الوان، مع استمراري لمشاهدة فيديوات صناعة الشموع في دول الخارج حاولت صناعتها ولكن تحتاج إلى قوالب خاصه وعطور والوان معينه، وتمكنت من ذلك
basic_info.business_summary: صناعة المنتج بجودة عاليه تنافسيه، وإضافة شي جديد للسوق اي الإقبال من قبل الزبائن، والسعر الذي سيكون تنافسي

profiles.project_name: مركز لتشخيص وعلاج آلام وانحنائات الظهر والرقبة .

basic_info.name: مركز لتشخيص وعلاج آلام وانحنائات الظهر والرقبة .
basic_info.short_description: استهداف الموظفين والمتقاعدين بصفة خاصة وأي شخص يعاني من مشاكل في الظهر والرقبة بصفة عامة
basic_info.target_customers: الموظفين في القطاعات العامة والخاصة والمتقاعدين عن العمل .
basic_info.why_apply: لغرض البلوغ أو الانتقال الى مرحلة الاحتضان في مسابقة غريان لرواد الاعمال .
basic_info.project_story: مشروعي الخاص : منذ فترة طويلة أتعرض لسماع مصطلح اعاني من مشكلة في الظهروخاصة للموظفين ، رسخت في ذهني وخطرت فيبالي فكرة إنشاء مركز تشخيص وعلاج هذه المشكلة وايجاد حل لها ، نظرا أنه لايوجد مركز مختص في علاج ألام الظهر وإنحنائاته وسوء قوامه .
basic_info.business_summary: أولا تم حصر عدد الموظفين في القطاعات الخاصة والعامة وقدّرو بما لا يقل عن 3000 موظف يعملون بشكل يومي وطويل على الحاسب الآلي وسيتم تسويق خدمتنا بالعرض الخاصر على هؤلاء الأفراد مع التسويق العام لكافة الشرائح بالأخص الذين يعانون من انحنائات وآلام الظهر والرقبة ، باشتراك عضوية أولا بعد تحديد السعر المناسب ثم مبلغ سيتم تحديده لتشخيص الحالة بمساعدة دكتور مختص والبدء في البرنامج التدريبي العلاجي عن طريق جلسات تهيئة وتمرينات علاجية لتقوية عضلات الظهر ، من ثم تدليك المناطق المؤلمة وتحسين القوام وعلاج هذا القصور او الألم .

basic_info.business_summary: يُعتبر هذا المشروع من المشروعات التي تُحقق عائدًا استثماريًا كبيراً، وذلك نتيجة الإقبال الكثيف والمستمر على المنتجات البلاستيكية المتعددة..

basic_info.name: حرفتي  ... صناعة المروحة الغدامسية التقليدية
basic_info.short_description: و فكرة المشروع هي الاهتمام بالصناعات التقليدية القديمة و التي تشتهر بها مدينة غدامس و خاصة ( المروحة التقليدية الغدامسية ) حيث سيتم تدريب مجموعة من النساء و الارامل و ربات البيوت لانتاج المروحة التقليديو  و إقامة معمل خاص لهذا المنتج
basic_info.target_customers: العملاء المستهدفين هم اولا شريحة النساء في الاعراس و السواح الاجانب و المحلين و الشركات العامة و الخاصة و بعض الناس القاطنين في الاماكن ذات الحرارة العالية و محلات الانتيكا
basic_info.why_apply: سبب الانضمام الالمام ببرامج ريادة الاعمال و كيفية انشاء شركة صغرى بالاضافة الى التعرف على كل ما هو جديد في برامج التسويق الميداني و الالكتروني و ايضا الالمام ببرامج ادارة المشاريع و تحديد الا
basic_info.project_story: قصة المشروع و هي نابعة من  احياء الصناعات التقليدية الغدامسية و خاصة المروحة الغدامسية التقليدية و المعرضة للانقراض و الاندثار و عليه لابد من خلق برامج و مشاريع تحي هذا الارث الحضاري المادي و اللامادي و توريثه للاجيال اللاحقة و من هنا جاءت فكرة المشروع
basic_info.business_summary: صناعة المروحة الغدامسية التقليدية و التي سينم بيعها للنساء و السواح الاجانب و المحلين و ايضا عامة الناس و ايضا سيتم المشاركة في المعارض المحلية و الدولية  لتسويق المنتج بالاضافة الى توريدها لمحلات الانتيكا و الاسواق الشعبية و بالاضافة الى طبع بعض الشعارات مثل شعارات  الاندية و شركات الاتصال و الطيران و غيرها على المروحة و بيعها لهم
basic_info.awards: شاركنا بعرض المنتج و هو المروحة الغدامسية التقليدية في العديد من المعارض المحلية والدولية و منها على سبيل الذكر في بريطانيا و تركيا و تونس و الجزائر و مصر و بالاضافة الى المشاركة الدورية بمعرض طرابلس الدولي و غيرها من المعارض و البازرات المحلية

basic_info.short_description: الرائدة هي شركة نظافة تقدم خدمات التنظيف لعملائها ، تتكون شركتنا من مجموعة من الموظفين اللذين يملكون الخبرة و المهارات اللازمة لأداء مهام التنظيف المختلفة ، شركتنا تتميز بتقديم خدمات غير موجودة عند شركات النظافة الاخرى مثل خدمة الاشتراك الشهري

basic_info.business_summary:
مصادر دخلنا متعددة ، منها مصادر اساسية و منها فرعية : 
مصدر الدخل الاساسي : من رسوم الاشتراك في سيارة القمامة ، التي يقدمها مشتركينا في نهاية كل شهر

مصدر الدخل الفرعي : باقي خدمات النظافة التي نقدمها تعتبر مصدر دخل فرعي لشركة
الخدمات التي نقدمها : 
طلب فوري لحضور سيارة القمامة
تنظيف و ازالة الاعشاب الضارة داخل الاسوار
خدمات النظافة التي تشمل المسح و التنظيف و التعقيم داخل جميع المباني .

We sell our hardware and software directly to the educational facilities. 
We also sell scenarios that can be used in simulation based medical educations. 
We provide a scenario market for educators to market their scenarios to the other educators. 
We are planning to sell subscriptions to the students to reach some scenarios and scenario-based games. 
Both B2B and B2C. Our market is all institutions where health education is given, such as medical faculties, nursing faculties, health vocational schools, training and research hospitals, provincial health directorates, and district health directorates. We use our website and digital commercial tools as marketing and sales channels. We hold meetings with key opinion leaders who are experts in their fields and ask them for consultancy regarding our product. Our aim here is to recommend our product to doctors with the relevant authority. In addition to all these, we take our product to our potential customers and make presentations and meetings (at this point, we have printed brochures for our product). With these face-to-face meetings, we aim to gain the trust of our potential customers, answer their questions, resolve their concerns, and sell our product faster. We make deals with sales channels with sales experience in the relevant field and good connections with medical schools, deans, doctors, and relevant users. At this point, we see the appropriate sales channels as the most effective solution with the lowest cost and risk for us to penetrate the market quickly.

basic_info.name: Green Pastures Livestock
basic_info.short_description: "Green Pastures Livestock Project is a sustainable and environmentally conscious endeavor committed to raising healthy and happy livestock. Located amidst lush green fields, we provide our animals with ample grazing opportunities.
basic_info.target_customers: Health-conscious consumers: Individuals who prioritize their health and seek high-quality, organic, and responsibly-raised meat and dairy products. They value knowing the source of their food
basic_info.why_apply: Seeking funding opportunities and training support for green pastures livestock project.
basic_info.project_story: Animal welfare was at the heart of the project. believed that happy, stress-free animals would produce superior meat and dairy products. The livestock roamed freely, basking in the sunshine, and relishing the succulent grasses that grew abundantly..
basic_info.business_summary:
Sustainable Livestock Rearing: The project focuses on sustainable livestock rearing practices that prioritize animal welfare, environmental stewardship, and regenerative agriculture. Livestock are raised in a natural and nurturing environment, with ample access to grazing and a focus on organic and responsible farming methods.

High-Quality Products: Green Pastures Livestock Project aims to produce high-quality meat and dairy products. The animals are fed a nutrient-rich diet, receive proper healthcare, and are raised without the use of hormones or antibiotics. This ensures that the end products are flavorful, healthy, and meet the expectations of health-conscious and discerning consumers.

Ethical and Transparent Practices: The project upholds ethical practices in animal husbandry, prioritizing animal welfare and promoting humane treatment throughout the rearing process. Transparent and traceable production methods are followed, allowing consumers to have confidence in the origin and quality of the products they purchase.

Targeted Marketing: The business model targets health-conscious, eco-conscious, and ethically-minded consumers. Marketing efforts focus on highlighting the sustainable and regenerative practices of the project, as well as the benefits of consuming products that align with their values. This includes emphasizing the organic nature of the products, the responsible land management practices, and the overall commitment to environmental and animal welfare.

Local and Direct Distribution: The Green Pastures Livestock Project establishes partnerships with local food markets, restaurants, and other specialty food establishments that share a similar focus on sustainability and quality. This enables direct distribution channels, creating a shorter supply chain and strengthening the connection between the project and its target customers.

Value Proposition: The business model offers customers the opportunity to support a local, sustainable, and ethical livestock rearing project while enjoying premium meat and dairy products. By prioritizing the welfare of animals, environmental sustainability, and health-conscious production methods, the Green Pastures Livestock Project delivers products that align with the values and preferences of its target customers.

Overall, the business model of the Green Pastures Livestock Project combines sustainable farming practices, high-quality products, ethical considerations, and targeted marketing to create a compelling offering in the market, appealing to customers who seek sustainable and responsible choices in their food consumption.

basic_info.name: EcoWise Solutions
basic_info.short_description: EcoWise Solutions is a dynamic startup at the forefront of Automated smart energy meter systems. Our technologies empower Energy providers to monitor user consumption without the need of human interaction, promoting energy efficiency for the USERS
basic_info.target_customers: Energy providers such us sompower company or mobile service providers such us Telesom or somtel
basic_info.why_apply: because ebina could provide us with the necessary resources, mentorship, funding, and networking opportunities to increase our chances of success.
basic_info.business_summary: EcoWise Solutions operates on a business model focused on selling smart energy meter systems and providing associated services to energy and electricity provider companies. Our revenue is generated through the sales of hardware components, and ongoing maintenance contracts. Additionally, we offer value-added services such as customization, and customer support, providing an additional revenue stream. Our goal is to establish long-term partnerships with energy providers, ensuring a sustainable revenue flow through product sales, service contracts, and continuous innovation in the energy management industry.

basic_info.short_description: A movers and packers business provides professional moving and packing services to individuals & businesses, helping them relocate their belongings efficiently and safely. Whether it's a residential move, commercial relocation, or specialized moving
basic_info.why_apply: I'm applying this to get capital at first and also get business mentoring or Training
basic_info.business_summary:
There are several ways to generate revenue and make money from a movers and packers business. Here are some potential monetization strategies:

Service Fees: Charge customers for the moving and packing services you provide. This can include fees based on the size and complexity of the move, the distance traveled, or the number of hours worked. Ensure that your pricing is competitive while still allowing for a profitable margin.

Additional Services: Offer additional services that customers may require during their move. This can include services like furniture assembly/disassembly, appliance installation, storage solutions, or cleaning services. Charge separate fees for these add-on services.

Packing Materials: Sell packing materials such as boxes, tape, bubble wrap, packing paper, and protective covers. Many customers prefer to purchase these items directly from their moving service provider for convenience. Markup the prices to generate profit on these supplies.

basic_info.name: KooBe Pos
basic_info.short_description: KooBe  mobile POS is revolutionizing small businesses with fast, secure transactions, inventory management, and customer analytics, all in one app."
basic_info.why_apply: The reason we are  applying to us funding is due to the alignment of our goals and values. Your organization has a strong track record of supporting initiatives and projects that align with t
basic_info.project_story: I started my mobile POS system business on august 10/ 2022, after seeing the growing demand for contactless payment options and the increase use of smartphones for business transactions, I saw an opportunity to create a product that could help sma
basic_info.business_summary:
Business model:

Our mobile POS system offers businesses a versatile and convenient payment solution designed specifically for on-the-go transactions.
The system provides a range of features, including daily sales, sales analysis between two dates, best-selling items, most profitable products, low quantity in stock alerts, and overview graphs.
Businesses benefit from real-time sales data, enabling them to make informed decisions about inventory management and pricing strategies.
Your system aims to streamline transactions, optimize operations, and empower businesses to focus on growth and profitability.

How to generate profit:

Our startup business offers a mobile point-of-sale (POS) system that is completely free to use. But the next 6 months we charge our customers monthly subscription like 15$ per month. Our aim is to provide a solution for small businesses and entrepreneurs who want to accept payments on the go without having to invest in expensive hardware. However, we do offer a thermal printer that connects via Bluetooth to the mobile POS system, which is how we generate revenue. The thermal printer provides a convenient and professional way for businesses to print receipts for their customers. We believe that our innovative approach to payment processing will help small businesses thrive and succeed in today's fast-paced digital world. 
We selling per item 40$ dollar and no available in our country.    
Finally we selling only thermal printer via Bluetooth and also there thermal papers roll.

basic_info.name: Hajir Sunrise farms
basic_info.short_description:
Professional Transition from Humanitarian Aid to Agriculture and Business
Hajir Abdi Hussein is an experienced Humanitarian Aid worker seeking to transition into the agriculture and business sectors.
basic_info.target_customers: Agriculture Suppliers and Service Markets,Retailers and Wholesalers: Supermarkets, grocery stores, and wholesalers are potential customers for agricultural produce. They require a consistent
basic_info.why_apply: Agricultural Investment Funds to support the development and expansion of agricultural ventures.
basic_info.project_story: Set Clear Goals: Define your specific objectives and outcomes for your agricultural projects. Determine what i want to achieve, such as increased crop yields, sustainable farming practices, or innovative agricultural products.
basic_info.business_summary:
The business model of agriculture involves the cultivation and production of crops, livestock, or other agricultural products for commercial purposes. The primary goal is to generate revenue through the sale of these products.

To make money in agriculture, several key strategies can be employed. These include:

Crop or Livestock Sales: Farmers and growers earn money by selling their harvested crops or livestock to wholesalers, retailers, or directly to consumers. This involves pricing the products competitively and ensuring consistent quality and supply.

Value-Added Products: Some agricultural businesses create value-added products by processing raw agricultural commodities into goods with higher market value. For example, fruits can be transformed into jams, dairy milk into cheese, or grains into flour. Selling these value-added products can generate higher profits.

Contract Farming: Entering into contract farming agreements with agribusinesses or food processors can provide a stable income stream. Under such arrangements, farmers grow specific crops or raise specific livestock according to the buyer's requirements and receive a predetermined price or share of the profits.

Agro-Tourism and Farm Experiences: Some farmers diversify their revenue streams by offering agro-tourism activities or farm experiences, such as farm stays, educational tours, or events like fruit picking. These activities can attract visitors and generate additional income.

Agricultural Services: Providing specialized services to farmers, such as machinery rental, irrigation system installation, crop consulting, or soil testing, can be a profitable business model. These services help farmers improve their productivity and efficiency while generating income for the service providers.

Government Grants and Subsidies: Governments often provide financial support, grants, or subsidies to farmers for adopting sustainable practices, investing in technology, or expanding their operations. Accessing and leveraging these opportunities can contribute to the financial success of agricultural businesses.

Agricultural Inputs and Supplies: Selling agricultural inputs like seeds, fertilizers, pesticides, and farm equipment can be a lucrative venture. Farmers rely on these inputs to enhance productivity and supplying them can generate steady revenue.

Successful agricultural businesses typically employ a combination of these strategies, adapt to market demands, and continually invest in improving productivity and efficiency to maximize profitability.
basic_info.awards: Africa Food Prize: The Africa Food Prize celebrates individuals, organizations, or institutions working towards improving agricultural productivity and transforming Africa's food systems. It recognizes efforts that promote innovation, sustainability.

owners.name: Hajir Hussein
owners.headline: Quia est exercitationem temporibus consequatur voluptas fugiat enim.
owners.bio:
Biography of Hajir Abdi Hussein

Hajir Abdi Hussein, born on February 8, 1987, in Beledxaawa, Somalia, hails from a pastoralist family. Raised by relatives due to the absence of his parents, he embarked on a journey to create a better future for himself and his loved ones.

Hajir's pursuit of education led him to successfully complete high school at Kwanthanze Secondary School. He further honed his skills by obtaining a Diploma in Development Studies from the Africa College of Professionals. Currently, he is pursuing a bachelor's degree in Public Administration at Plasma University in Kismayo, Jubaland State, Somalia.

With over a decade of experience in the NGO sector, Hajir has held various positions, showcasing his expertise and dedication within the humanitarian field.

In his personal life, Hajir is a married man and proud father of six children. His family serves as the driving force behind his aspirations for financial independence and the betterment of their lives. However, he faces challenges due to limited resources and financial scarcity, hindering the realization of his ambitions.

Passionate about community development, Hajir actively engages in mobilizing the community towards achieving economic, social, and political goals.

Currently employed as a humanitarian aid worker, Hajir aspires to transition his career into the fields of business or agriculture, seeking personal fulfillment and greater contributions to community development.

Hajir Abdi Hussein's legacy and impact are ongoing. With his unwavering determination, resilience, and commitment to positive change, he aims to leave a lasting impression on the lives of those he encounters. Through his future endeavors, Hajir hopes to inspire others to overcome obstacles and strive for a brighter future, both for themselves and their communities.

basic_info.business_summary: Our company is dedicated to provide high quality service of education. We collect a staff of teachers whom their quality is confirmed and checked well. We will  register each and everyone of them the subjects that he/she can teach, places that he/she can operate/reach and the time he/she can work. After that, we will look and found the home tuitions that are available in, and we will negotiate the parent and agree with him/her the subjects that his/her child will teach, the time it takes and also the salary of the teacher. After that, we call and send the teacher which is apropriate to this job. Our income generation is that we will have a percentage of each salary of the teacher. Salaries which are in between $100-300$ we will have 10% of it. Salaries which are more  than $300, we will get 15% of it. And all these system will be discused and share with the teachers before they become member of this company.

basic_info.name: building materials for houses
basic_info.short_description: Modern building materials offer numerous benefits for houses, combining durability and energy efficiency. From sustainable options like bamboo and recycled materials to advanced insulation and weather-resistant components, they enhance comfort,
basic_info.target_customers: Target Customers found that there is a market opportunity that is highly equipped
basic_info.why_apply: I am asking you to get funding and to get business ideas to improve my life and my family.
basic_info.project_story: Our story began with a vision to revolutionize the housing industry. Armed with a passion for sustainability and innovation, we set out to create exceptional building materials. Through tireless research and development, we now offer cutting-edge so
basic_info.business_summary: Our business model revolves around providing high-quality building materials for houses while generating revenue through various channels. Firstly, we sell our products directly to homeowners, contractors, and builders, ensuring a steady stream of income from product sales. Additionally, we offer specialized services such as installation, consultation, and project management, allowing us to charge fees for these value-added services. Furthermore, we establish partnerships with construction companies and suppliers, earning commissions through referral programs and wholesale transactions. We also explore collaborations with architects and designers, providing them with our materials for their projects and receiving royalties or licensing fees. Lastly, we may engage in strategic alliances with real estate developers, benefiting from bulk purchases and long-term contracts. By diversifying our revenue streams, we maximize profitability and maintain a sustainable business model in the building materials industry.

basic_info.business_summary: A digital agency is a company that provides a range of digital marketing services to help businesses increase their online visibility, attract new customers, and grow their brand. Digital agencies typically specialize in areas such as web design, search engine optimization (SEO), social media marketing, content marketing, email marketing, and digital advertising. They work with clients to develop customized digital strategies that align with their business goals and target audience, and use data and analytics to measure the success of their campaigns. The goal of a digital agency is to help businesses leverage digital channels to achieve their marketing objectives and stay ahead of the competition in an increasingly digital world.

owners.name: Zak Farah
owners.headline: Quis quia vel sint.
owners.bio:
''Abdirizak is known for his belief in the power of technology solution starts with the people you’re designing for and ends with new solutions that are tailor-made to suit their needs.''

My mission is to think end-to-end about the user experience, both broadly and deeply. Giving end users an experience without problems isn’t good enough; I want the experience to be immersive and pleasing for each and every customer. I understand users' perceptions, desires, needs, frustrations, environments, to identify problems related to the products and services they are using.

I love being able to make technology useful, usable, and beautiful for people globally. That is what makes me excited and passionate about working as a UX designer.

I may not be an expert in UX, but I am constantly dedicated to realizing what I need, enriching my knowledge consistently by gaining more from educated individuals, and fostering the abilities & skills that are important to UX design.

basic_info.project_story: AbdirizakMohamed Ali,a dedicated farmer, embraced modern agriculture techniques. With drip irrigation, he nurtured his crops, conserving water and maximizing yields. His hard work and innovation transformed his land, bringing prosperity to his pepole
basic_info.business_summary: A greenhouse business operates by cultivating and selling plants, flowers, or produce within a controlled environment. The primary revenue streams for a greenhouse business come from the sale of plants, including ornamental flowers, vegetable seedlings, herbs, or specialty crops. The business model focuses on maximizing plant growth and quality through climate control, efficient water use, and pest management. Additionally, the business may generate income by offering services such as plant propagation, landscaping, or educational workshops related to gardening and horticulture.

owners.headline: Commodi deleniti provident sunt ipsa velit saepe.
owners.bio:
My name is Khalid Mohamed Abdulle, and I am a motivated and enthusiastic individual hailing from Hagadhera. I recently graduated from university, where I acquired a solid educational foundation and developed a range of valuable skills.

Throughout my academic journey, I demonstrated a strong work ethic and a genuine passion for learning. I actively engaged in various extracurricular activities, which allowed me to cultivate my leadership and teamwork abilities. I was consistently involved in student organizations, taking on roles that required effective communication and organizational skills.

One of my notable strengths is my exceptional problem-solving aptitude. I possess a sharp analytical mindset, allowing me to dissect complex issues and devise creative solutions. This skill has proven invaluable during my university years, where I successfully tackled challenging projects and assignments.

In addition to my academic achievements, I have developed a set of practical skills that make me a well-rounded individual. I am proficient in various computer applications, including Microsoft Office Suite, which enables me to create professional documents and presentations. I am also adept at conducting research and gathering information from diverse sources, utilizing both online and offline resources.

Furthermore, I possess strong interpersonal skills that enable me to connect with people from diverse backgrounds. I am an excellent listener, which allows me to understand others' perspectives and collaborate effectively within teams. I am adaptable, open-minded, and always eager to learn from others' experiences.

As a recent graduate, I am excited to embark on a career where I can apply my knowledge and skills to make a positive impact. I am eager to contribute to a dynamic and challenging work environment, where I can continue to learn and grow both personally and professionally.

In summary, I am Khalid Mohamed Abdulle, a dedicated and proactive individual who has recently graduated from university. With my strong problem-solving abilities, practical skills, and interpersonal acumen, I am ready to embrace new opportunities and thrive in the professional world.

basic_info.name: Bidhaan Studio
basic_info.short_description: Bidhaan Studio is a studio production based at Garowe Somalia .The Studio began because I saw a gap in the market. There wasn’t  female photographers since majority of us women feel shy from the cameramen.
basic_info.why_apply: The reason why I am applying is that I'm looking for the right support , resources and mentorship to turn my startup business which is currently open into a profitable business and as well to
basic_info.project_story:
Hi, I'm Hamdi Abdikadir Abdi  founder of Bidhaan Studio Production which is based at Garowe - Somalia. 
The Studio began because I saw a gap in the market. There wasn’t  female photographers since majority of us women feel shy from the cameramen.
basic_info.business_summary:
Girls and couples need female photographers with whom the girls can be themselves and  wont feel shy or be quite uncomfortable. 
This studio provides a special feature especially for Families and older generations  , the feature is called Self photoshoot the ability to see  and take your own picture.

Our target audiences  girls , couples ,  families with new borns for baby pictures and as well developing a relationship with the clients.
Bidhaan Studio focuses on making the studio a fun place for families and all the youths and adults helping them capture special moments.

How Does the Studio make Money?
The studio will earn money from the  packages we offer which has price lists each with a different prices.It will also earn money from weddings , birthday celebrations, graduations. we will also get many sales through advertisement and many women and couples who disliked a guy to take her pictures due to feeling of shyness will also book the studio and that will generate more revenue.

basic_info.short_description: HUBAAL ONLINE DATA EXCHANGE is a new business that is being implemented in the city of Kismayo in general and it is an online one about how the community can buy data online and upload it to customers in different parts of jubaland state.
basic_info.target_customers: My business is being used by everyone who uses smart phones, such as students, teachers, businessmen, elders and different sections of society who need internet data. I will benefit from this
basic_info.why_apply:
in order to invest our company we need money to start our business run on .so that, as we realize our dreams and ambitions in this new business, we hope you will invest in our new vision.
An
basic_info.project_story: This business will be managed by me as Daud Ali Same and it will work 24 hours a day online with all my friends asking everyone to work with me in the easiest way for customers to get internet data service.
basic_info.business_summary:
When I evaluated the city market, especially the companies that provide internet data service, I am sure that this opportunity is one that I can use my creativity as a business, which is a social need because some communities often benefit from reduced insurance and where they can find the internet. more data than they used to get from the company and that is a good opportunity for me because I can get a lot of customers if it is different parts of the society.
My business brings low cost and high speed internet to reasonable customers eg Order now and get fast and efficient service.
    Example: Cheap price like somnet company 1 dollar gives you 2.5 GB and I will give honorable customers 1 dollar to get 3 GB of INTERNET, Hormuud company 1 dollar gives 2.5 GB but I give customers 1 dollar to get 3 GB INTERNET and Somtel company gives 1 dollar for 3 GB but I give customers 1 dollar to get 3.5 GB INTERNET. Also every Friday we will make an additional data offer for our customers.
basic_info.awards: my business is new one and i am going to start if i get this investment

owners.name: Daud Ali same
owners.headline: Voluptatum voluptatibus consequatur dolores.
owners.address: main road of airport, Dalcada, calanleey village,kismaayo, Kismayo, Somalia
owners.bio:
My name is Daud Ali Same; I was born in Somalia especially at the headquarter of Jubaland state called Kismaayo town specially in rural area named Abdalla Biroole, on the date of 01/01/1998. So that, I grew up in the Dadaab camps especially the Hagadera camp, and I started in 2006 my school from central primary school upto waberi secondary school education which I completed in 11 September 2016.
After that, I had finished my secondary levels. I returned back to my hometown which is the city of Kismaayo and then, I got an educational opportunity that was given to the whole country of Somalia which was fully scholarship in the country of Ethiopia especially in the Tigray region. Late, I study Adigrat University in the Department of Earth science especially Geology major was Hydro-geologist. Therefore, I finished my B.Sc. Degree at 15th July 2020. Then, I returned to my mother country especially Jubaland state. I got a volunteer job in the Ministry of Energy and Water Resource of jubaland state and worked as Technical Engineering on water department for designing, implementing, monitoring and reviewing humanitarian projects both local and regional projects and upto now I am there to work the government institution.
I declare that all the details furnished above are true to the best of my knowledge and belief.

basic_info.short_description: oceans east Ltd is a travel, tourism, and logistics services start-up is an ambitious venture aiming to revolutionize the way people explore the world, manage their travel needs, and optimize logistics operations.
basic_info.target_customers: Our target customers include: Individual Travelers, Tourists and Explorers, Business Travelers, Corporations and Organizations, Event Planners and Exhibitors, Sustainable and Responsible Trav
basic_info.why_apply: By participating in the program, I expect to gain invaluable resources, mentorship, and networking opportunities that will significantly accelerate the growth of my startup. I am eager to acc
basic_info.project_story: My journey starts with a deep-rooted passion for innovation and a strong desire to make a positive impact by creating job opportunities. From the very beginning, my vision has been to develop a venture that not only drives economic growth but also
basic_info.business_summary:
TripConnect, our travel, tourism, and logistics services start-up, operates on a business model that focuses on connecting travelers with various aspects of their trips. We generate revenue through service fees for travel planning, booking assistance, logistics optimization, and event management.                                             
 











The business model of our travel, tourism, and logistics services project is built around providing comprehensive solutions for travelers and businesses while generating revenue through various channels. Here is a summary of our business model and how we make money:

Travel Services: We offer a range of travel services such as travel planning, booking assistance, personalized itineraries, and destination exploration. We generate revenue through service fees charged for these services.

Logistics Solutions: We provide logistics planning, supply chain optimization, and transportation management services to businesses. Our revenue is generated through service fees for optimizing their logistics operations.

Event Management: We offer event management services for corporate events, conferences, and exhibitions. Our revenue comes from service fees charged for event planning, coordination, and logistics support.

Partner Commissions: We earn commissions from partner businesses including airlines, hotels, transportation providers, and activity organizers. These commissions are received for referring customers and facilitating bookings with our partners.
International holiday packages: are meticulously designed to offer travelers unforgettable experiences in some of the most captivating destinations around the world. Whether you crave cultural immersion, breathtaking natural landscapes, or thrilling adventures, our packages cater to diverse interests and preferences.
Subscription or Membership: We may offer premium subscription or membership plans that provide additional benefits, exclusive access, and personalized services. Our revenue is generated through subscription or membership fees.

By combining these revenue streams, our travel, tourism, and logistics services project aims to provide valuable services while sustaining the business financially. We continuously strive to enhance the travel experience, optimize logistics operations, and explore partnerships to drive revenue growth.

basic_info.business_summary: Somgreen's business model revolves around delivering exceptional landscape gardening and maintenance services thatcombine expertise, sustainability, customization, and excellent customer service. By serving residential and commercial customers, focusing on landscape design, garden maintenance, tree care, and consultation services, Somgreen generates revenue through design/installation projects, ongoing maintenance contracts, tree and shrub care, and consultation fees. Key activities involve landscape design/installation, garden maintenance, tree care, and consultation services. The company's key resources include a skilled workforce, equipment/tools, plant nurseries/suppliers, and technology/software. Somgreen reaches customers through online channels, social media, referrals, and local marketing efforts. The cost structure includes labor, materials, overhead expenses, equipment maintenance, and marketing/advertising. Key partnerships may be formed with nurseries/suppliers, contractors, and professional associations.

basic_info.business_summary: The graphic design industry typically makes money by charging clients for their design services. Graphic designers may charge hourly rates or project-based fees, depending on the scope of the project. They may also charge additional fees for revisions, rush projects, or the use of specialized software or equipment. Some graphic designers also sell digital products, such as stock graphics or templates, or offer design-related courses or workshops for an additional revenue stream. Ultimately, the profitability of a graphic design business depends on the quality of their work, their ability to attract and retain clients, and their ability to manage their time and resources effectively.
basic_info.awards: Not having awards with your work does not necessarily mean that your work is not of high quality or that it lacks value. Awards can be a great way to gain recognition and exposure for your work, but they are not the only measure of success.

owners.bio:
As a graphic designer, I am a professional who combines creativity and technical skills to design visual concepts using computer software or by hand. may work on a variety of design projects, including logos, brochures, websites, advertisements, and magazines, among others.
Some of key responsibilities as a graphic designer may include brainstorming and ideating design concepts, selecting appropriate colors, fonts, and layouts, creating graphics and illustrations, and collaborating with clients or team members to refine designs based on feedback.
May also need to keep up with industry trends and software updates to stay competitive in the field. Excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to meet deadlines are also important qualities for a successful graphic designer.
Overall, being a graphic designer can be a rewarding career for those who enjoy expressing their creativity and have a passion for design.

basic_info.name: Kulmiye Livestock association company
basic_info.short_description: Animal Selection: Choose the appropriate livestock species or breeds based on the purpose of rearing, the local environment, market demands, and available resources. Consider factors such as adaptability, productivity, and suitability
basic_info.target_customers: Meat Production:  Local consumers: Individuals or families who purchase meat products directly for personal consumption. Restaurants and eateries: Establishments that serve meat-based dishes
basic_info.why_apply: I have prepared a detailed business plan that outlines the goals, strategies, and financial projections for the livestock rearing business therefore I am requesting to get funding for my busi
basic_info.project_story: am writing to formally request grant funding to support the establishment and operation of my livestock rearing business. After careful research and planning, I am confident in the potential success of this venture , your feedback is much appreciate
basic_info.business_summary:
Sale of Livestock: You can sell your livestock for various purposes, such as meat production, dairy, egg production, breeding, or as working animals. Identify potential buyers, such as local consumers, restaurants, butchers, farmers, or livestock auctions, and market your livestock accordingly.

Meat, Milk, or Egg Products: Process your livestock products into value-added products like meat cuts, milk, cheese, yogurt, butter, or processed eggs. This allows you to fetch higher prices and cater to specific market demands. Establish connections with local retailers, restaurants, or food processors to sell your products.

Breeding Stock: If you have high-quality and genetically superior livestock, you can sell them as breeding stock to other farmers or breeders. Advertise and market your animals' desirable traits and genetics to attract potential buyers looking to improve their herds or flocks.

Livestock Services: Offer services related to livestock, such as artificial insemination, animal healthcare, livestock transportation, or training services for working animals. These services can generate additional income streams by utilizing your expertise and resources.

Agritourism: If your livestock rearing operation is suitable for visitors, consider opening your farm for agritourism activities. Offer guided tours, educational programs, petting zoos, or farm experiences to attract tourists and generate revenue.
